title: Billing & Subscription
subtitle: Manage your subscription plan and billing information

trial.banner_description: Your trial ends in {days} days. Upgrade to a paid plan to continue using CoOrder.ai after your trial.

status.past_due_description: Your payment is overdue. Please update your billing information to continue using CoOrder.ai.

upgrade.title: Ready to Upgrade?

billing_history.title: Billing History & Invoices
billing_history.description: Need a copy of your invoices or billing history? Contact our support team and we'll send them right away.
